creator: joeb@a1poweruser.com
text:
What makes the maintainer think the developers will ever update the release
again? From the developers website it looks like the project has been dead
for quit some time. This patch comes direct from the developer's web site
and is older than the current release. To me it looks like the project is
maintained somewhere else and the source deposited here for public access.

Everything is already provided. The diff is included in the bug-request.
